name: HelixQA Fixes Validation — Project Agnosticism
description: Regression suite that asserts HelixQA + every submodule library stays 100% decoupled from any specific consuming project.

test_cases.name: HelixQA learning pipeline works on arbitrary project names

steps.name: BuildKnowledgeBase(root, nil)
steps.expected: Components={alphaservice, betafrontend, gamma-tv} — no catalog-* invented

test_cases.expected_result: Auto-discovery is marker-file driven, not name-driven

test_cases.name: Config NewGitConfig ships generic author defaults
test_cases.expected_result: Library has no project-specific default identity

test_cases.name: Containers Planner takes caller-supplied component catalogue

steps.name: NewPlanner(hostMgr, []BuildComponent{{Name:'svc-api',HasGo:true}})
steps.expected: Planner exposes .Components() returning the same slice

steps.name: planner.PlanAll(ctx)
steps.expected: Schedules only svc-api — no catalog-api leaked

test_cases.expected_result: Library no longer knows Catalogizer component names

test_cases.name: Challenges userflow-runner fails without --platform-groups

steps.name: userflow-runner --platform api (no --platform-groups)
steps.expected: Exits with 'invalid platform' error — no hardcoded default fell through

test_cases.expected_result: CLI forces caller to declare their topology

test_cases.name: Grep gate — top-level submodule production code

steps.name: grep -rn 'catalog-api|catalogizer' --include='*.go' --exclude='*_test.go' {submodule}/
steps.expected: zero matches across Assets Auth Cache Challenges Concurrency Config Containers Database Discovery DocProcessor Entities EventBus Filesystem Lazy LLMOrchestrator LLMProvider Media Memory Middleware Observability RateLimiter Recovery ReplayBuffer ScreenDiff Security Storage Streaming TrainingCollector VisionEngine VisualRegression Watcher HelixQA

test_cases.expected_result: Any regression is caught by a single grep
